content: When the operator insists a file or resource exists and Claude has been refusing, STOP arguing — fetch origin/main and inspect the remote tree first. The 2026-05-09 cruise-tipping session had Claude refuse 4+ times that image.jpg was on disk; it was at the repo root on main exactly where the operator said. Sharp operator language is a redirect signal to fetch the obvious source of truth.

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
